title: botrychium multifidum
intro: Botrychium multifidum, also known as the autumn fern or multi-leafed grape fern, is a type of rare and unique fern that belongs to the Ophioglossaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Botrychium multifidum include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although the preparation and usage should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to the plant's rarity and potential side effects.
